title: stachys recta subsp. arenariiformis
intro: Stachys recta subsp. arenariiformis, also known as Rock Betony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Rock Betony include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Rock Betony can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to promote relaxation and relieve stress.
